title: THETA Control Room — Build Hook Delta

changedProjects.lastKnownStatus: Build hook reported latest project state.
changedProjects.nextAction: v0.4.51 — OUTPUT EQ: MACHINE-TOOL CHART PLATE (user's reference: vintage lathe feed-rate nomogram — cream plate, blue graticule, red curves; picks via mockups: EQ-B pre+post display, K3 CREAM knob). SHIPPED: 4 EQ plates baked (Resources/Plates/eq_hybrid|green_1x|2x from creosote_eq_scene.py --mode plates — exact OutputEqPanel geometry 732x210, cream chart at the graph rect (6,34,494,170), graticule at the graph's OWN log-20-20k / +/-18dB mapping so baked lines land under live curves, DejaVu blue labels, screws). OutputEqPanel: panel bg -> theme+scale-selected plate (UI_THEME aware); EqGraph under kPlates skips bg/grime/grid/labels and draws NOMOGRAM INK — blue dashed PRE (staticPts), red POST 2.2px (livePts), dynamic fill red 0.14 (was purple), band nodes = numbered red silkscreen discs with cream numerals (selection = larger disc + dark ring); EqInspectorKnobLAF gained the K3 CREAM path (cream skirt+cap, black pointer, disabled dims; cyan renderer kept for legacy); inspector labels silk cream DejaVu Bold. All legacy painting intact behind kPlates. VERIFY: EQ tab reads as the chart plate; drag bands (red discs), watch dynamics duck the red curve over the blue dashed pre; knobs cream with black pointers; both themes. OPEN: header buttons/tabs polish vs plate; LIMITER rename.
